title: 8 Things the Phone Is Actually Costing Your Faith
caption:
It's not just a distraction. It's a slow tax on everything you're trying to build.

Your first hour. Your attention span. The conversation happening two feet away. Your ability to sit in silence with God. The man you're becoming. Your eyes. Your sleep. Your prayer time.

The phone isn't neutral. Every minute you give it is a minute you're not giving something else. And most men don't notice until they take stock of who they've become — and find less than they expected.

You don't need a detox. You need a war.

Save this if the phone has been winning.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #phonefasting #discipline #realtalk #christianity
